channel.title: Programming on Lucas Pauker
channel.description: Recent content in Programming on Lucas Pauker

item.title: Your Prod Code Should Have Bugs
item.description: Debugging prod on a Friday night What is your job as a software engineer? When you ship software, you are balancing the following two things: Get it done fast -> doing it faster means the feature appears earlier for customers and ultimately the business makes more money Don’t introduce bugs -> bugs can cause outages or other errors that lead to losses The problem is that anyone that has worked with software knows that no matter what, you cannot guarantee that your shipped software will not have bugs.
